title: rosa alpina var. glandulosa
intro: Rosa alpina var. glandulosa is a variety of alpine rose, a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, characterized by its pink to purple flowers and hairy leaves. The medicinal properties of Rosa alpina var. glandulosa include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as having antimicrobial properties to prevent infections and promote overall well-being. Rosa alpina var. glandulosa can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
